memoryArtifacts.description:
Louis de France, duc de Guyenne. Né le 22 janvier 1397, mort le 18 décembre 1415. Fils de Charles VI de France et d'Isabeau de Bavière. Il fut le troisième dauphin de France.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans於1372年3月13日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France34歲，母親Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France34歲。他於1384年與Valentine Visconti在法國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年11月23日在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans于1372年3月13日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France34岁，母亲Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France34岁。他于1384年与Valentine Visconti在法国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年11月23日在他的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans was born on 13 March 1372, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France, was 34 and his mother, Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France, was 34. He married Valentine Visconti in 1384, in France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 November 1407, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans est né le 13 mars 1372, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Valentine Visconti en 1384, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1407, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans am 13. März 1372 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France 34 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France 34. Er hat 1384 in Frankreich Valentine Visconti geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. November 1407 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans è nato il il 13 marzo 1372 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Valentine Visconti nel 1384, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1407, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans(이)가 1372년 3월 13일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1384년 프랑스에서 Valentine Visconti(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 11월 23일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans nasceu em 13 de março de 1372, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Valentine Visconti em 1384, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1407, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans родился 13 марта 1372 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Valentine Visconti в 1384 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 ноября 1407 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Kingdom of Fran: Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia
es.Orléans, Département du Loiret, Centre,: Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis de Valois I, duc d'Orléans, Duke of Orléans nació el 13 de marzo de 1372, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Valentine Visconti en 1384, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1407, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
